attempts.hypothesis: MultiFilterSelect.searchAndSelectOption's retry() wrapper unconditionally re-clicks the dropdown toggle button on every attempt; if a prior attempt already opened the menu and only failed on the later searchInput wait, the retry's open() call closes the already-open menu (toggle behavior), guaranteeing every subsequent attempt fails at the same line.
attempts.fix_applied: multi-filter-select.ts: check whether a menu is already visible before deciding to call dropdown.open() (click) vs dropdown.setMenu() (re-resolve reference only).
attempts.result: red-green-revert not independently re-provable per-attempt (shared fix with 654214/654202); 20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 PASS (8-worker parallel, inventory-v2/actions + inventory dir)
20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 PASS (8-worker parallel, inventory-v2/actions + inventory dir)

tests/products/inventory-v2/actions/prin.test_name: [654204] Verify inventory print action is triggered

attempts.hypothesis: Test used the DataGrid's own @deprecated waitForLoadingToOccurAndComplete() helper, documented as 'shown to introduce flakes' because it can resolve on stale rows still present from before the filter re-render.
attempts.fix_applied: Swapped to cellWithTextInColumn({dataField:'serialNumber', text: SerialNumber}) + expect().toBeVisible(), waiting for the specific filtered row.
attempts.result: red-green-revert PASS; 20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 PASS (8-worker parallel, inventory-v2/actions + inventory dir)

tests/products/inventory/update-on-locat.test_name: [654103] Verify that dropdown selected state is preserved when location changes

attempts.hypothesis: 30s toPass budget for the reload-and-poll loop was too tight: each retry cycle costs a full page reload, and the just-created package/location data isn't guaranteed indexed immediately.
attempts.fix_applied: Bumped toPass timeout from 30000 to 60000, matching the 60s budget already used a few lines later in the same test for a comparable first-row-render wait.
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 PASS (8-worker parallel, inventory-v2/actions + inventory dir). NOTE: this is a timeout bump, flagged in PR for human timeout-discipline sign-off per anti-flake rules.

tests/registers/transactions/by-register.test_name: [656960] Close out of register with negative deposit should remove deposit amount from vault register

attempts.hypothesis: findCellsByText's default 15s timeout was too tight for a grid lookup that follows a multi-step register close-out workflow; other DataGrid waits in the same file allow 60-90s for comparable post-workflow renders.
attempts.fix_applied: Passed timeout: 45000 at this specific call site only (not the shared default, since most callers query immediately after goto()).
attempts.result: 20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 PASS (8-worker parallel, registers/transactions/by-register dir). NOTE: this is a timeout bump, flagged in PR for human timeout-discipline sign-off per anti-flake rules.

tests/marketing/discounts/restrict-disco.test_name: [405475] Verify that one or more vendors can be excluded from the Discount

attempts.hypothesis: ControlSearchInput.search() races waitForTotalCountToChange() against noDataAvailable.waitFor() via Promise.race -- a transient 'No data available' re-render right after creating the discount can win that race before the real 1-row result appears, letting clickRow proceed against a row that doesn't exist yet. Reproduced directly: error-context.md showed the search box populated with the discount name while the grid displayed 'No data available'.
attempts.fix_applied: Wrapped the reopen-discount search + row-presence check in an expect().toPass() retry (idempotent action+assertion pair) instead of editing the shared ControlSearchInput.search() helper (too broad a blast radius for this run).
attempts.result: Red reproduced directly (No data available race, isolation run before fix); green with fix (isolation pass); revert-rerun did not re-reproduce red on demand (consistent with the race's inherent intermittency -- matches its nightly behavior of failing only sometimes); 20/20 Vape isolation PASS; load-realistic 3/3 clean PASS (8-worker parallel, marketing/discounts dir; one of four load runs surfaced an unrelated pre-existing flake in a different test in the same file, [405511], out of scope for this fix)
